Hi Murielle. Before the report, how many open vacancies do we have right now?
We have several open vacancies, about eight. The good news is we received many applicants last month.
That is great. But how is the current team? Do you have enough staff?
Honestly, we do not have enough staff at night, so the team is doing too much overtime. There is also a lot of absence.
I see a connection there. Do we have data on it?
Yes, we collected a lot of feedback and the data is clear. We have plenty of resources for training, just a little less time.
Good. So what is your headline for the report?
Many applicants, not enough staff, and too much overtime. Let us fix the shortage first.
We received many applicants last month.
We collected a lot of feedback and the data is clear.
How much feedback and how many applicants did we get?
We have a shortage of engineers this quarter.

Hi Murielle, it's Liam. Here is a quick summary of our workforce data before the report. Right now we have several open vacancies, about eight in total, and we received many applicants last month, so that is good news. However, we do not have enough staff in the night shift, so the team is doing too much overtime. There is also a lot of absence this quarter, more than usual, and I think there is a connection. On the positive side, we collected a lot of feedback from the exit interviews, and the data is very clear. We have plenty of resources for training, but we need a little more time to organize it. In one line: many applicants, not enough staff, and too much overtime. Let's fix the shortage first. Talk soon.

Good morning, Murielle. This is Diana from London, with a quick note on staffing before the board meeting. We have a shortage of engineers across three regions. There are not many senior applicants in the market, and we do not have much time before the deadline. My team has collected a lot of data, and the picture is clear: we have too many open vacancies and too few recruiters. We also have very little budget left for agencies this quarter. My recommendation is simple. We need a few quick wins: first, reduce overtime, because there is too much of it; second, give the recruiters more resources; and third, ask for a little extra headcount. If we do this, we are going to close most of the gap. I am sending you the numbers now. Thank you.
